name: WAIZ HUSSAIN
title: FULL STACK | AI BUILDER | AUTONOMOUS SYSTEMS DEVELOPER
about: Full Stack Developer and AI Builder with hands-on experience in designing, developing, and deploying real-world applications across web, mobile, and AI domains. Specialized in building Autonomous Systems, SaaS products, and offline-first AI applications using modern development stacks and AI-assisted workflows. Strong understanding of system architecture, API integrations, and scalable design patterns. Capable of transforming ideas into fully functional production-ready products including complete ecosystems (web + mobile + tools + automation).

details: Developed scalable UI using React.js & Next.js
Converted UI/UX designs into production-ready code

education: ADSE - Advance Diploma in Software Engineering (Aptech Ongoing)
strengths: Ability to build complete systems end-to-end

projects.title: TIKTOK DOWNLOADER - FLAGSHIP SAAS
projects.description: A complete SaaS ecosystem built from scratch for downloading TikTok videos efficiently. Features video downloading without watermark, bulk downloader system, fast processing engine, and clean UI. Full platform coverage: web application, mobile app, plugin/extension system.

projects.title: JEWELRY STORE WEBSITE

Product detail sections with clean structure
innovation: Minimalistic layout for better product highlighting
Clean structure suitable for scalable e-commerce upgrade

final_statement: Not just a developer — a builder focused on creating real, usable, and scalable digital products using modern technologies and AI-powered workflows.
